title: Fatty Crunchy Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Irish stew featuring minced beef and lardons, perfect for a cold and rainy day. This dish is satvik-friendly and packed with fatty and crunchy textures.
instructions: Render the lardons in a large pot over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
Add the minced beef to the pot and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onions, carrots, and potatoes to the pot and cook until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the beef broth, guinness stout, salt, and pepper to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew for 1 hour, or until the meat and vegetables are tender.
Add the rendered lardons back to the pot and stir to combine.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
